summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blue Lotus auth and projects integration. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, Signup, Dashboard, and Project Creation flows all working. Fixed 1 critical bug in Builder.jsx.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - React runtime error: Objects are not valid as React child when rendering user.credits object directly
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed user?.credits || 1850 to calculate total credits from object properties

critical_code_review_comments: All project endpoints working: GET /api/projects/, POST /api/projects/, DELETE /api/projects/{id}
Health check returns 35 engines as expected
Frontend-backend integration fully functional for auth and projects
User credits and plan data correctly displayed on dashboard
Project creation flow works end-to-end from UI to database
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with unique emails during signup tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth and Projects integration fully tested and working. Builder.jsx had a bug with credits display that was fixed. All 35 engines operational. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_projects.py covers auth and project CRUD.

backend_api_tests.login_valid_credentials: PASS - Returns token and user data
backend_api_tests.login_returns_credits: PASS - Credits object with monthly, bonus, purchased
backend_api_tests.signup_new_user: PASS - Creates user with free plan and 20 starter credits
backend_api_tests.create_project: PASS - Creates project with draft status
backend_api_tests.delete_project: PASS - Deletes and returns 404 on re-fetch
backend_api_tests.full_dashboard_flow: PASS - Login -> Get user -> Get projects

frontend_ui_tests.landing_page_load: PASS - Shows Blue Lotus branding and Sign In/Get Started buttons
frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Email/password form, redirects to dashboard on success
frontend_ui_tests.signup_flow: PASS - Name/email/password form with User Agreement modal, redirects to dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_display: PASS - Shows Welcome message, credits, plan status, projects list
frontend_ui_tests.new_project_flow: PASS - Type selection -> Project details -> Generate Project
frontend_ui_tests.builder_page: PASS (after fix) - AI Builder interface with chat and preview

bug_fixed.reason: user.credits is an object with keys {monthly, monthly_total, bonus, bonus_total, purchased, starter, last_bonus_refresh}, not a number. Rendering it directly caused React runtime error.
